# Raino — Agentic PCB & PCBA Workflow Platform

> Raino converts fuzzy hardware intent into structured specs, selects approved architectures, resolves procurement data, generates KiCad projects, and produces manufacturing bundles with rough quotes. MIT licensed, open source.

## Pages

- [/ (Home)](https://raino-site.vercel.app/) — Product overview, features, and getting started
- [/features](https://raino-site.vercel.app/features) — Feature breakdown with descriptions
- [/architecture](https://raino-site.vercel.app/architecture) — System architecture diagrams and package structure
- [/docs](https://raino-site.vercel.app/docs) — Documentation hub with getting-started guide
- [/workflow](https://raino-site.vercel.app/workflow) — 12-step workflow explainer

## Product App

- [Raino Studio](https://raino-studio.vercel.app/) — The design workflow application (requires auth)

## Key Facts

- MIT licensed, open source
- KiCad is an external GPL boundary — not embedded
- Supplier adapters (DigiKey, Mouser, JLCPCB) use interface+adapter pattern
- Quote source of truth is structured supplier adapters, not RAG
- No fake integrations — all degraded modes are labeled
- Tech stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Prisma, Supabase, Vitest
